title: hieracium caesium subsp. involutum
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. involutum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Hieracium caesium subsp. involutum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Hieracium caesium subsp. involutum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
